personal.name: Anshul Guleria
personal.tagline: I build intelligent systems for the real world.
personal.bio: AIML Intern at TheSmartBridge, contributing to next-generation solutions powered by AI. Specializing in Machine Learning, Generative AI, and deploying production-grade FastAPI applications within SmartBridge's ecosystem.

projects.title: MentorMind - AI Tutor App
projects.description: End-to-end AI tutoring system supporting semantic document search, adaptive quizzes, and context-aware responses using RAG and LLMs.
projects.longDescription: MentorMind is a full-stack AI tutoring platform built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL. It uses a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline powered by Pinecone and SentenceTransformers to deliver context-aware responses from uploaded study material. The system integrates Llama 3 and Gemini APIs to automate quiz generation and produce adaptive learning summaries tailored to each student. All endpoints are secured with JWT authentication and role-based access control, making it production-ready.
highlights: Designed end-to-end RAG pipeline using Pinecone + SentenceTransformers for semantic search
Integrated Llama 3 and Gemini APIs for automated quiz generation and adaptive summaries
Secured all APIs with JWT authentication and role-based access control
Built interactive Streamlit frontend connected to FastAPI backend

projects.title: Demand-Supply Chain Gap Prediction
projects.description: LSTM-based time-series forecasting model to predict demand trends and reduce supply chain gaps, deployed as a Streamlit dashboard.
projects.longDescription: This project tackles demand forecasting in supply chain management using a deep learning approach. An LSTM network was built with TensorFlow to capture temporal dependencies in demand data. Extensive feature engineering was performed — including lag features and rolling statistics — to improve model stability and accuracy. The final model significantly outperforms baseline regression approaches on RMSE and was packaged as reusable artifacts deployed through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.
highlights: Built LSTM time-series model in TensorFlow capturing complex temporal demand patterns
Engineered lag and rolling features that significantly improved forecasting stability
Reduced RMSE compared to baseline linear regression models
Packaged reusable model artifacts for efficient inference via Streamlit dashboard

experience.description: Working on real-world AI and ML projects in a professional setting. Responsibilities span model development and evaluation, API development, and building Generative AI applications using state-of-the-art LLMs.
highlights: Developed and evaluated various ML and DL models for production use
Built REST APIs using FastAPI for model serving and integration
Worked on Generative AI projects leveraging Gemini and Llama 3 LLMs
